//: Merge the 'hooks' block below into ~/.gemini/settings.json under a top-level 'hooks' key. If you already have 'hooks.BeforeTool', append this array entry rather than overwriting. See .gemini/INSTALL.md for rationale and event-name mapping vs the Claude Code plugin.

hooks.name: lean-spec-workflow-guard
hooks.description: Blocks direct Write/Edit on features/*/workflow.json to prevent hand-edits that bypass phase-gate commands.
